title: Shoals Technologies Group and ON.energy to deploy critical power systems for leading AI data center operator
text: Shoals Technologies Group and ON.energy announce deployment of critical power systems for AI data centers. The partnership between Shoals Technologies and ON.energy represents a strategic expansion into the rapidly growing AI data center market. Shoals brings decades of electrical engineering expertise in the solar and renewable energy sectors and is leveraging that knowledge for data center applications. ON.energy provides advanced UPS and backup power technology designed for mission-critical infrastructure. Together the companies are positioning themselves to capture a portion of the anticipated $24 billion AI data center power supply systems market by 2028 according to UBS Securities forecasts. The collaboration marks Shoals expansion beyond its traditional utility-scale solar market where it holds approximately 50% market share. This diversification into data centers and AI infrastructure represents a significant growth opportunity as global demand for power-intensive AI systems continues to accelerate. The partnership also capitalizes on Shoals newly expanded manufacturing capacity in Portland Tennessee which positions the company to scale production to meet anticipated data center demand.
